parameters.subject: Hours alert: {{ $json['Business Name'] }} at {{ $json.hoursPercent }}% of budget ({{ $json['Tier'] }})
parameters.message:
Client hours review for {{ $json.month }} {{ $json.year }}:

Client: {{ $json['Business Name'] }}
Tier: {{ $json['Tier'] }}
Budget: {{ $json.hoursBudget }} hrs
Ceiling: {{ $json.hoursCeiling }} hrs
Actual: {{ $json.hoursActual }} hrs ({{ $json.hoursPercent }}% of budget)
{{ $json.overCeiling ? 'STATUS: OVER CEILING — overage billing required' : 'STATUS: Over budget but under ceiling — review required' }}

Actions:
- If hours > ceiling: prepare overage invoice ($85/hr above ceiling)
- Consider whether client should be re-tiered
- Review what drove the extra hours this month
